---
title: "Six great things about UseR! 2019"
date: 2019-07-13
categories: [event]
tags: [R, conference, toulouse]
description: "Highlights from UseR! 2019 conference in Toulouse"
---

UseR! is the most popular annual meeting for R enthusiasts. UseR! 2019 was held in Toulouse, France.

## Key highlights

1. **Community**: Huge, friendly community of R users
2. **Tutorials**: Excellent workshops on topics from Shiny to tidyverse
3. **Keynotes**: Inspiring talks from RStudio and academia
4. **Networking**: Met people from diverse backgrounds
5. **Packages**: Saw the latest developments in R packages
6. **Location**: Toulouse was a great host city

It was my first UseR! conference and definitely won't be the last.
